name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description: Set with approximately 0.7ct old cut diamonds. Unmarked but tests as 18ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. 1.8g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Ring
description: Set with oval-cut sapphires and brilliant cut diamonds. Stones are set into 18ct white gold. Fully hallmarked. 3g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description: Set with five graduated brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.5ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked for London, 1978. 3g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description: Set with five graduated brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.25ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Stamped for 18ct and platinum. Diamonds are set into platinum. 1.6g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Trefoil Ring
description:
Set with oval-cut sapphire and brilliant-cut diamonds. Fully hallmarked for London, 1988. 

Please note that one of the prongs on the sapphire shows signs of wear but the goldsmith has verified that the stone is secure. 2.3g.

name: 9ct White Gold Diamond Half-eternity Ring
description: Art deco-style band bezel- and claw-set with brilliant-cut diamonds. Fineness stamp for 9ct gold. 3.3g.

name: 18ct White Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with graduated round brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.80 carats. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham, 1984. 
2.7g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Diamond Ring
description:
Set with a central marquise-cut sapphire flanked on each side by five princess cut sapphires within a border of round brilliant cut diamonds. Stamped 9ct for nine carat gold. Late 20th century. 
3.7g.

name: 18ct White Gold Diamond Five Stone Ring
description:
Set with five brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 1ct. Diamonds are all eye clean, bright and well-matched. Fully hallmarked. 
3.16g.

name: 9ct Bezel-set Sapphire and Diamond Band
description: 9ct yellow gold ring set with an oval-cut sapphire, accented by two sparkling diamonds in a classic two-tone setting (sapphire set into 9ct white gold). Fully hallmarked. 2.8g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Pear-cut Lab Diamond Solitaire
description:
1.04ct pear-cut lab-grown diamond set in polished 9ct yellow gold, featuring a contemporary flowing bypass design. D colour and VS1 clarity. Diamond is IGI-certified. Certificate provided with ring. 
2.9g

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Half-eternity Ring
description: Set with round brilliant-cut diamonds totalling approximately 1.2ct (assessed as D/E colour and VVS1/2 clarity). Fineness stamp of 750 indicating 18ct gold. 5.2g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Gypsy Ring
description: 18ct yellow gold band star-set with a .05ct diamond. Diamond is eye clean and bright. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham (date symbol is worn). 5.5g

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Gypsy Ring
description:
18ct yellow gold band star-set with a little old mine cut diamond. The band features openwork scroll detailing to the shoulders. There are no hallmarks but the piece tests as 18ct gold. Hallmarks may have been removed while sizing at some point during its lifetime. 3.9g.

Please note that size is listed as UK O and a half/P as it falls just between the two on a sizing mandrel.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Belcher-style Solitaire
description: 18ct yellow gold set with an approximately 0.15ct diamond. Diamond is extremely bright with excellent clarity. name: 18ct White Gold Princess-cut Diamond Trilogy
description: 18ct white gold band set with three princess-cut diamonds in a bezel-style setting. Diamonds are eye clean, extremely white and bright. Fully hallmarked.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Bezel-set Diamond Trilogy
description:
18ct yellow gold band bezel-set with three diamonds. Diamonds are set into 18ct white gold. Diamonds have exceptional colour and clarity. 2.7g.

The channel-set diamond band shown alongside the ring in some photographs is for styling purposes only and is not included with the purchase.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Trilogy
description:
Antique 18ct yellow gold bypass ring set with three old cut diamonds totalling approximately 0.5 carats. Diamonds are eye clean and bright with a warmth characteristic of old cuts. Unmarked but tests as 18ct gold. 1.7g.

The channel-set diamond band shown alongside the ring in some photographs is for styling purposes only and is not included with the purchase.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Sapphire and Opal Gypsy Ring
description:
9ct yellow gold band star-set with sapphires and fiery opals. Fully hallmarked for Birmingham, 1977. 2.6g.

This ring has been lovingly restored by my goldsmith. The original opals were damaged and so have been replaced with two brand new natural opals.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Trilogy
description: 9ct yellow gold individually claw-set with three diamonds. Fully hallmarked. 1.8g.

name: 18ct Yellow Gold Diamond Crossover Band
description: Delicate 18ct yellow gold bypass ring set with ten bright, white diamonds. Unmarked but tests as 18ct. 1.5g.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Diamond Etoile Band
description:
9ct yellow gold band flush-set with scattered diamonds totalling approximately 0.25cts. Fully hallmarked. 3.2g.

Please note that this ring is not suitable for resizing.

name: 9ct Yellow Gold Hand-engraved Cigar Band
description: 9ct yellow gold cigar band hand-engraved with foliate detailing. Fully hallmarked. 3.5g.
